overall.description: First-person driving gameplay from Cyberpunk 2077, featuring a nighttime journey through heavy rain and fog. The drive begins in a rural desert area with muddy terrain and wooden shacks, transitions onto an elevated highway system, passes through tunnels, and ends in a green-lit underpass. The scene is illuminated by streetlights and vehicle headlights, creating a moody, atmospheric cyberpunk aesthetic.

scene_state.functional_zone: rural desert shanty area with muddy roads and wooden structures

agents.ego_description: navigating slowly through muddy desert terrain past wooden shacks and chain-link fences

entered.detail: weathered wooden building with corrugated metal roof, typical of desert shantytowns
metal chain-link fencing running alongside the muddy path
scattered rocks and mud ruts on the unpaved desert road

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a rainy night in a rural desert area, driving through deep mud past wooden shacks and fences. The terrain is rough and unpaved, with sparse vegetation visible in the periphery. Heavy rain and fog reduce visibility as the vehicle navigates the muddy ruts.

scene_state.functional_zone: highway entrance ramp with concrete barriers and overhead signage

events.description: transition from muddy rural terrain to paved highway ramp
vehicle accelerates from 24 km/h to 71 km/h while merging onto the elevated highway

agents.ego_description: accelerating onto the highway system via the entrance ramp, following a van ahead

notable_agents.action: white van driving ahead on the highway ramp, brake lights illuminated

entered.detail: yellow-topped concrete barriers lining both sides of the highway ramp
smooth asphalt pavement with lane markings replacing the muddy terrain
large highway direction sign suspended over the roadway

segments.scene_description: The vehicle transitions from the muddy desert onto a paved highway ramp, accelerating rapidly. Concrete barriers line the sides as the road elevates, and a white van is visible ahead. The environment shifts from rural shacks to industrial highway infrastructure.

scene_state.functional_zone: multi-lane elevated highway with overhead lighting and traffic signals

events.description: overtaking a green sports car on the right side of the highway
approaching tunnel entrance with red traffic lights visible ahead

agents.ego_description: driving at high speed on the multi-lane highway, overtaking a green sports car and approaching a tunnel

notable_agents.action: green sports car being overtaken on the right, moving at slower speed

entered.detail: tall street lamps casting yellow light through the fog and rain
elevated highway infrastructure with concrete support columns
overhead traffic signal showing red light above the tunnel entrance

segments.scene_description: The vehicle speeds along the elevated highway, overtaking a green sports car while streetlights pierce through the heavy fog. Traffic signals and tunnel entrances become visible ahead as the road stretches forward through the rainy night.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered highway tunnel with continuous overhead lighting

events.description: entering tunnel, lighting shifts from streetlamps to continuous artificial tunnel lights
approaching tunnel exit, natural darkness and rain visible at the portal

agents.ego_description: maintaining high speed through the enclosed tunnel section, navigating gentle curves

entered.detail: concrete ceiling of the highway tunnel with ventilation grates
smooth concrete walls with reflective safety markers
rows of overhead fluorescent lights illuminating the enclosed space

segments.scene_description: The vehicle enters a long highway tunnel, shielded from the rain but illuminated by continuous overhead fluorescent lights. The enclosed concrete space creates an echoing, immersive environment as the vehicle speeds toward the distant exit portal.

scene_state.functional_zone: underpass tunnel with distinctive green neon lighting and graffiti-covered walls

events.description: exiting first tunnel into brief open stretch before entering green-lit underpass
entering underpass with distinctive green neon lighting replacing white tunnel lights
passing walls covered in colorful graffiti under the green neon glow

agents.ego_description: exiting the tunnel and entering a green-lit underpass, navigating past graffiti-covered walls

entered.detail: distinctive green fluorescent lighting strips casting an eerie glow on the wet pavement
concrete walls covered in colorful graffiti including 'FUTURE' text and abstract art
metal guardrail along the right side of the road

segments.scene_description: Exiting the first tunnel, the vehicle briefly enters open air before plunging into another underpass illuminated by striking green neon lights. The walls are covered in vibrant graffiti, creating a distinctly cyberpunk atmosphere as the vehicle approaches the checkered tunnel exit marking.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey that transforms from a desolate, muddy rural wasteland into a high-speed industrial highway. It begins by navigating a vehicle through deep mud and heavy rain, passing weathered wooden shacks and fences under a thick blanket of fog. As the rough terrain gives way, the camera accelerates smoothly from the dirt onto a paved highway ramp, shifting the surroundings from rural decay to concrete barriers and industrial infrastructure. The scene then expands as the vehicle speeds along the elevated road, overtaking a green sports car while streetlights pierce through the persistent rain. Finally, the perspective pushes forward through the hazy night toward distant traffic signals and tunnel entrances.

The shot follows a continuous high-speed drive that transitions from a sterile, industrial tunnel into a vibrant, neon-lit urban underpass. It begins within a long concrete highway tunnel, where the vehicle is shielded from the rain and guided by the rhythmic glow of overhead fluorescent lights. As the vehicle speeds toward the distant exit portal, the enclosed space opens briefly into the rainy night air before plunging immediately into a second underpass. The environment then shifts dramatically as the lighting turns to striking green neon, illuminating walls covered in vibrant graffiti. The scene finally concludes as the vehicle approaches a checkered marking at the tunnel's exit.
